title: Hadad`ezer #1909
definition:
Hadadezer = "Hadad is help"

 1) son of Rehob, a king of Syria-Zobah defeated by David's army
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hadadezer = "Hadad is help"

 1) son of Rehob, a king of Syria-Zobah defeated by David's army

    NASB:  Hadad is help(er), an Aramean (Syrian) king
